mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND role = #{role}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, role, name, avatar, balance, coupons, points, member_level, total_consumption, total_drinks, favorite_category, shop_name, address, phone, income) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{role}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{balance}, #{coupons}, #{points}, #{memberLevel}, #{totalConsumption}, #{totalDrinks}, #{favoriteCategory}, #{shopName}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{income})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, name = #{name}, avatar = #{avatar}, balance = #{balance}, coupons = #{coupons}, points = #{points}, member_level = #{memberLevel}, total_consumption = #{totalConsumption}, total_drinks = #{totalDrinks}, favorite_category = #{favoriteCategory}, shop_name = #{shopName}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, income = #{income} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET balance = #{balance} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET income = #{income} WHERE id = #{id}
